name: swil-social
description: Monorepo wrapper — runs client and server concurrently in dev.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix server run typecheck && npm --prefix client run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --prefix server run lint && npm --prefix client run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix server run lint:fix && npm --prefix client run lint:fix
scripts.format: npm --prefix server run format && npm --prefix client run format
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix server run format:check && npm --prefix client run format:check
scripts.test: npm --prefix server run test && npm --prefix client run test:run
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix server run test:coverage && npm --prefix client run test:coverage
